title: Embedded Finance with Issuing (V2 Financial Accounts)
description: Build an embedded financial services integration with Issuing and V2 Financial Accounts, using V2 money movement APIs for funding.

steps.title: Activate Issuing and Financial Accounts
steps.description: Activate Issuing and Treasury for platforms in a sandbox environment from the Dashboard.

nodes.title: Activate in Dashboard
nodes.description: Activate Issuing and Treasury for platforms from the Dashboard to get API access.
nodes.review_prompt: Open the app and confirm the user-facing flow works as described.

steps.title: Create a connected account
steps.description: Create a connected account to represent a business customer of your platform with the requisite capabilities.

nodes.title: Create a connected account
nodes.description: Create a US-based connected account with transfers, card_issuing, treasury, and us_bank_account_ach_payments capabilities.
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API, reuses values needed by later steps, and handles API errors without exposing secrets.

nodes.title: Create onboarding link
nodes.description: Create an onboarding link for the connected account to complete verification and enable capabilities.
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API, reuses values needed by later steps, and handles API errors without exposing secrets.

nodes.title: Complete account verification
nodes.description: Open the onboarding link to complete verification for the connected account and enable its capabilities.
nodes.review_prompt: Open the app and confirm the user-facing flow works as described.

steps.title: Get v2 Financial Account
steps.description: List the connected account’s Treasury Financial Accounts to get the v2 Financial Account ID for funding and cards.

nodes.title: List Treasury Financial Accounts
nodes.description: List financial accounts for the connected account to get the v2 Financial Account ID (data[].id).
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API, reuses values needed by later steps, and handles API errors without exposing secrets.

steps.title: Link a bank account and add funds
steps.description: Link an external bank account and transfer funds into the financial account.

nodes.title: Fund balance
nodes.description: Run this test helper to simulate a credit to the connected account’s financial account. Run the List Treasury Financial Accounts step above first. Same as the Dashboard “Enter an amount to fund your balance for testing.” Test mode only.
nodes.review_prompt: Run the helper flow and confirm it advances test state without adding helper-only parameters to application code.

nodes.title: Link a bank account
nodes.description: Create a SetupIntent to link an external bank account for ACH transfers.
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API, reuses values needed by later steps, and handles API errors without exposing secrets.

nodes.title: Add funds to financial account
nodes.description: Create an inbound transfer to move funds from the linked bank account into the financial account.
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API, reuses values needed by later steps, and handles API errors without exposing secrets.

nodes.title: Wait for inbound transfer
nodes.description: Wait for the inbound transfer to be completed before creating a cardholder. This may take a few minutes.
nodes.review_prompt: Run the relevant Stripe CLI trigger or complete the upstream flow, then confirm the handler receives and verifies the expected event.

steps.title: Create a cardholder and card
steps.description: Create a cardholder representing an authorized user and issue them a virtual card.

nodes.title: Create a cardholder
nodes.description: Create a cardholder with business details including name, email, phone number, and billing address.
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API, reuses values needed by later steps, and handles API errors without exposing secrets.

nodes.title: Accept user terms
nodes.description: Update the cardholder to accept the card issuing user terms of service.
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API, reuses values needed by later steps, and handles API errors without exposing secrets.

nodes.title: Create a virtual card
nodes.description: Create a virtual card in USD currency and attach it to the cardholder.
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API, reuses values needed by later steps, and handles API errors without exposing secrets.

nodes.title: Activate the card
nodes.description: Update the card status to active so it can be used for purchases.
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API, reuses values needed by later steps, and handles API errors without exposing secrets.

steps.title: Use the card
steps.description: Create a test authorization and capture the funds to simulate a card purchase.

nodes.title: Create a test authorization
nodes.description: Generate a test authorization to simulate a card purchase at a merchant.
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API, reuses values needed by later steps, and handles API errors without exposing secrets.

nodes.title: Capture the authorization
nodes.description: Capture the pending authorization to complete the transaction and debit the financial account.
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API, reuses values needed by later steps, and handles API errors without exposing secrets.
